title: On a Positive Note
lyrics: [Music] I've scared myself from this moment on. Yeah, if I could see if I could be me I Would look at this world with a degree of niceness, but until then well They're alright. Too many times you're telling me it's fine when I look back at it and all I did was corrupt my mind. Make me not be happy with me. Make me not It'll be okay, come on, just nod your head you're not cheap. Pulling out the edge, come back from the ledge and chewing just fish. Nah, stand up and ride like tell you what. It's still good to hear on a positive note. Yeah, it's still good here. I wish it wasn't burning all around me. I wish there wasn't fire all around me. I wish I was just so fucking hard like I don't care I don't care if I'm not and I don't care if I think these negative thoughts are game but why is all I can think is it's all on me the positive it's all on me the negative And when you learn that I guess it's still fucking hard to be positive On a positive note, I just talked about me instead of talking about the world but We're back to the degree I got I'm sure you're better at it than me, so don't take my advice. But continue to live your life so nice, so nice, so nice. nice to everyone but me That was... On a positive note...

lyricsSegments.text: I've scared myself from this moment on.
Yeah, if I could see if I could be me I Would look at this world with a degree of niceness, but until then well
They're alright. Too many times you're telling me it's fine when I look back at it and all I did was corrupt my mind. Make me not be happy with me. Make me not
It'll be okay, come on, just nod your head you're not cheap. Pulling out the edge, come back from the ledge and chewing just fish. Nah, stand up and ride like tell you what.
It's still good to hear on a positive note. Yeah, it's still good here. I wish it wasn't burning all around me. I wish there wasn't fire all around me.
I wish I was just so fucking hard like I don't care
I don't care if I'm not and I don't care if I think these negative thoughts are game but why is all I can think is it's all on me the positive it's all on me the negative
And when you learn that I guess it's still fucking hard to be positive On a positive note, I just talked about me instead of talking about the world but
We're back to the degree I got
I'm sure you're better at it than me, so don't take my advice. But continue to live your life so nice, so nice, so nice.
That was... On a positive note...
